raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the causal effect of LLM assistance on annotation quality as the central contribution and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs (e.g., clarifying the IV/LATE distinction).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim: the 0.87 AUC classifier's applicability to individual worker filtering.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the detector deployment recommendation invites real downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some provenance gaps remain."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the causal effect of LLM assistance on annotation quality as the central contribution and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs (e.g., clarifying the IV/LATE distinction).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim: the 0.87 AUC classifier's applicability to individual worker filtering.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the detector deployment recommendation invites real downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some provenance gaps remain.
